---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement to the core engine, a skill, or documentation
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

One sentence: what should QAForge do that it doesn't do today?

## Which part of QAForge does this affect?

- [ ] Core engine (Manager / Analyst / Test Case Gen / Data Resolver / Automation Engineer / Validator / Reporter / Fixer)
- [ ] Skill pack (which one?):
- [ ] Context templates
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Example project
- [ ] Other:

## Describe the improvement

What would the new behavior look like? If it's an agent change, describe what the agent would do differently.

## Why is this useful?

What problem does this solve? What kind of project or team would benefit?

## Alternatives considered

What workarounds or alternatives exist today?

## Additional context

Links, screenshots, or examples that help explain the request.
